sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value String, random_value UInt64 DEFAULT rand64());
SELECT id, value, random_value % 10 AS modulo_random FROM test_table WHERE random_value % 2 = 0;
SELECT value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table t2 WHERE t2.random_value % test_table.random_value > 5) AS correlated_count FROM test_table;
SELECT id, value, rand64() % (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) AS random_modulo_group FROM test_table GROUP BY id, value HAVING random_modulo_group > 0;
SELECT value, rand64() % (CASE WHEN value IS NOT NULL THEN length(value) ELSE 1 END) AS random_modulo_length FROM test_table ORDER BY random_modulo_length DESC;
SELECT id, rand64() % random_value AS modulo_result FROM (SELECT id, rand64() AS random_value FROM test_table) AS derived_table WHERE random_value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (num UInt64, result Nullable(UInt64));
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT random_value, rand64() % random_value FROM test_table WHERE random_value > 0;
SELECT num, result, (SELECT avg(result) FROM temp_table WHERE result IS NOT NULL) as average_result FROM temp_table WHERE result IS NOT NULL HAVING result < average_result;
